title: sb add --help creates worktree instead of showing help
description: Running 'sb add --help' creates a worktree named '--help' and a branch 'feat/--help' instead of displaying help text. Subcommands need basic flag parsing to handle --help and -h before treating the argument as a worktree name.

title: Add input validation for pathological branch/worktree names
description:
Add aggressive input validation to reject pathological worktree/branch names:
- Names starting with dash (-)
- Names with path traversal (../, ./)
- Names with shell metacharacters ($, `, |, ;, &, etc.)
- Empty names or whitespace-only
- Names that are git reserved (HEAD, refs/, etc.)
- Excessively long names
- Names with null bytes or control characters
Fail fast with clear error messages.

title: Add sb doctor command for health checks
description: Add 'sb doctor' command that checks: stale worktree refs, misplaced worktrees, worktrees/ in .gitignore, orphan branches. Similar to 'bd doctor' pattern. Should suggest fixes.

title: sb remove cannot handle names starting with dash
description: Running 'sb remove --foo' tries to remove worktree named '--' not '--foo'. Need to support '--' separator or better argument parsing for names starting with dashes.

title: Add --json output mode for agent consumption
description: Add '--json' flag to list/audit commands for machine-parseable output. Agents need structured data for programmatic worktree management. Format: {worktrees: [{name, path, branch, status}]}
